topics: Students should collect the necessary data for the design of water treatment plant, complete the quantity estimation and design pumps and pipe appurtenances
Students should design sedimentation tanks along with necessary parameters like coagulant dosage
Students should design the filtration and disinfection system
Students should design a water distribution network and network analysis to be done using EPANET
The whole project along with layout of treatment plant and distribution network to be presented before the panel
